deferrals.summary: the review_dedupe guard's HEAD/BRANCH resolution (gh pr view ... 2>/dev/null || echo "") swallows gh stderr, so the root cause of a resolution failure (auth vs rate-limit vs missing PR) is unrecoverable from the log; the #269 change gives HEAD a second consumer (the notice body's short SHA)
deferrals.explanation: pre-existing lines unmodified by this PR's diff (the guard's query block predates #269; the diff only moved the notice post out of the step and added the head= output on the suppress branch)
